SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2025BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF VILLA DORADO OWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF IS TOM BLAIR. DEFENDANT ARTEM RUSSAKOVOSKII AND EMILIE BRESMAN ARE PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLA DORADO OWNERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSSAKOVOSKII, ARTEM BRESMAN, EMILIE $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSAKOVOSKII, ARTEM BRESMAN, EMILIE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY VILLA DORADO OWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSAKOVOSKII, ARTEM BRESMAN, EMILIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
